title: justicia gilliesii
intro: Justicia gilliesii, also known as the Australian fireweed or bushman's friend, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern regions of Western Australia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Justicia gilliesii include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, making it a valuable resource for natural remedy enthusiasts.
